name: First South Financial
description_short: Member-owned credit union serving Greater Tennessee with full-service banking, lending, and investment products. NCUA-insured with top 1% national safety rating.
description_long:
First South Financial is a federally-chartered credit union serving the Greater Tennessee region, positioning itself as a community-focused financial institution. The organization emphasizes membership benefits and local presence through multiple branch locations and ATM networks across Tennessee.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts, CDs and IRAs, credit cards (Visa Platinum variants), personal loans, auto loans, mortgages, home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), and student loan refinancing. They provide business banking services including commercial real estate loans, business credit cards, and lines of credit. Additional offerings include health savings accounts (HSAs), investment services, prepaid cards, and VISA gift cards. The organization also serves Spanish-speaking members through dedicated Hispanic Member Services.

First South distinguishes itself through current promotional offers including 6.25% APY on high-yield checking (up to $10,000), 1.99% APR HELOCs, 0% APR balance transfer credit cards, and member referral bonuses ($50 per successful referral). They advertise being ranked in the top 1% nationally for safety and soundness. The credit union emphasizes member education through calculators, how-to guides, FAQs, and a newsletter subscription service.

As a credit union, First South operates on a not-for-profit, member-owned model with NCUA insurance protection. However, the website content provided does not include specific information about asset size, membership requirements, field of membership restrictions, or detailed fee structures that would affect comparison with competitors. The competitive rates advertised suggest active market positioning, though these represent promotional rates requiring specific balance or usage requirements.
services: High-yield savings accounts and money market accounts
Visa Platinum credit cards (multiple variants including Titanium/Edge, Flex Rewards, Advantage, Fresh Start, Share Secured)
Personal loans and Fresh Start Saver Loans
Auto loans with pre-approval and promotional financing
Home Equity Lines of Credit (HELOCs) and home equity loans
Student loan refinancing for undergraduate and graduate borrowers
Prepaid cards and VISA gift cards
pros: Top 1% nationally ranked for safety and soundness (NCUA-insured)
High-yield checking at 6.25% APY on balances up to $10,000
0% APR for 12 months on balance transfer credit cards with 3X travel rewards
Member referral program offering $50 bonuses for both parties
60-day no-payment auto loan promotion ('Drive Today, Pay Later')
Full-service mortgage lending with multiple loan options
Spanish-language member services and Hispanic community focus
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure aligned with member interests
cons: Geographic limitation to Greater Tennessee region may restrict membership or service accessibility
No information provided about membership eligibility requirements or field of membership restrictions
Promotional rates require meeting specific conditions (balance limits, direct deposit, etc.) that may not apply to all members
Limited detail on fee structures, monthly maintenance costs, or overdraft policies beyond mention of 'Overdraft Privilege'
No transparency provided regarding asset size, member count, or competitive positioning relative to other regional credit unions
best_for: Tennessee residents seeking member-owned, not-for-profit banking with top-tier safety ratings
Consumers interested in promotional high-yield checking and competitive lending rates
Spanish-speaking members requiring dedicated bilingual banking services
Small business owners needing comprehensive business banking and commercial lending services
diagnosis: First South Financial is best suited for Tennessee-based consumers and small business owners seeking member-owned credit union banking with competitive promotional rates and a strong safety record. The primary caveat is geographic limitation to Greater Tennessee—potential members outside this region should verify field of membership eligibility, and those relying on promotional rates must confirm they meet specific balance or usage requirements.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: First South Financial — NCUA-insured credit union in Bartlett, TN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
